title: pugetia subglobosa
intro: Pugetia subglobosa, commonly known as the Desert Lavender, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The health benefits of Pugetia subglobosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The therapeutic actions of this plant are attributed to its ability to calm the nervous system, promote relaxation, and soothe digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Pugetia subglobosa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
